001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl.*;
024
025/**
026 * Serializes POJO models to JSON5L (JSON5 Lines).
027 *
028 * <h5 class='topic'>Media types</h5>
029 * <p>
030 * Handles <c>Accept</c> types:  <bc>application/json5l, text/json5l</bc>
031 * <p>
032 * Produces <c>Content-Type</c> types:  <bc>application/json5l</bc>
033 *
034 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
035 * <p>
036 * JSON5L combines the relaxed JSON5 dialect with JSONL's newline-delimited framing: each top-level
037 * value is written as a compact document on its own line, exactly as {@link JsonlSerializer} does.
038 * <p>
039 * By <b>default</b> the per-line output is strict RFC-8259 JSON (byte-identical to
040 * {@link JsonlSerializer}), keeping output maximally portable.  The {@link Builder#json5Sugar()
041 * json5Sugar()} opt-in switches the per-line output to JSON5 sugar (single-quoted strings, unquoted
042 * field names where safe).
043 *
044 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
045 * <p class='bjava'>
046 *    <jc>// Strict-per-line output (default)</jc>
047 *    String <jv>json5l</jv> = Json5lSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.serialize(<jv>myList</jv>);
048 *
049 *    <jc>// JSON5-sugar-per-line output</jc>
050 *    Json5lSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = Json5lSerializer.<jsm>create</jsm>().json5Sugar().build();
051 *    String <jv>json5l</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>myList</jv>);
052 * </p>
053 *
054 * <h5 class='figure'>Example output, sugar off (List of beans):</h5>
055 * <p class='bjson'>
056 * {"name":"Alice","age":30}
057 * {"name":"Bob","age":25}
058 * </p>
059 *
060 * <h5 class='figure'>Example output, sugar on:</h5>
061 * <p class='bjson'>
062 * {name:'Alice',age:30}
063 * {name:'Bob',age:25}
064 * </p>
065 *
066 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
067 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
068 * </ul>
069 *
070 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
071 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/Json5l">JSON5L Basics</a>
072 * </ul>
073 */
074@SuppressWarnings({
075   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable
076   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_camelCase convention (e.g., ARG_copyFrom)
077})
078public class Json5lSerializer extends JsonlSerializer {
079
080   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
081
082   /**
083    * Builder class.
084    */
085   public static class Builder extends JsonSerializer.Builder<Builder> {
086
087      private static final Cache<HashKey,Json5lSerializer> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, Json5lSerializer.class).build();
088
089      boolean json5Sugar;
090
091      /**
092       * Constructor, default settings.
093       */
094      protected Builder() {
095         produces("application/json5l")
096            .accept("application/json5l,text/json5l,application/jsonl;q=0.9,application/x-ndjson;q=0.9,text/jsonl;q=0.9")
097            .type(Json5lSerializer.class)
098            .useWhitespace(false);
099      }
100
101      /**
102       * Copy constructor.
103       *
104       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
105       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
106       */
107      protected Builder(Builder copyFrom) {
108         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
109         json5Sugar = copyFrom.json5Sugar;
110      }
111
112      /**
113       * Copy constructor.
114       *
115       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
116       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
117       */
118      protected Builder(Json5lSerializer copyFrom) {
119         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
120         json5Sugar = copyFrom.json5Sugar;
121      }
122
123      /**
124       * Emit JSON5 sugar (single-quoted strings, unquoted field names where safe) on each line
125       * instead of strict RFC-8259 JSON.
126       *
127       * <p>
128       * Off by default, in which case the per-line output is byte-identical to
129       * {@link JsonlSerializer}.
130       *
131       * @return This object.
132       */
133      public Builder json5Sugar() {
134         json5Sugar = true;
135         return this;
136      }
137
138      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
139      public HashKey hashKey() {
140         return HashKey.of(super.hashKey(), json5Sugar);
141      }
142
143      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
144      public Json5lSerializer build() {
145         return cache(CACHE).build(Json5lSerializer.class);
146      }
147
148      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
149      public Builder copy() {
150         return new Builder(this);
151      }
152   }
153
154   /** Default serializer, strict-JSON-per-line. */
155   public static final Json5lSerializer DEFAULT = new Json5lSerializer(create());
156
157   final boolean json5Sugar;
158
159   /**
160    * Creates a new builder for this object.
161    *
162    * @return A new builder.
163    */
164   public static Builder create() {
165      return new Builder();
166   }
167
168   /**
169    * Constructor.
170    *
171    * @param builder The builder for this object.
172    */
173   public Json5lSerializer(Builder builder) {
174      super(builder.useWhitespace(false));
175      json5Sugar = builder.json5Sugar;
176   }
177
178   /**
179    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this serializer emits JSON5 sugar on each line.
180    *
181    * @return <jk>true</jk> if JSON5 sugar is enabled.
182    */
183   public boolean isJson5Sugar() {
184      return json5Sugar;
185   }
186
187   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
188   public Builder copy() {
189      return new Builder(this);
190   }
191
192   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
193   public Json5lSerializerSession.Builder createSession() {
194      return Json5lSerializerSession.create(this);
195   }
196
197   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
198   public Json5lSerializerSession getSession() {
199      return createSession().build();
200   }
201}
